updates.title: Update
updates.summary:
- The "Into Space" biome's main gameplay will be reserved for the full game, but you can still get a preview and explore it in the demo! Go to the right and take the elevator
- Made the kamikaze drone slower when charging
- Increased the Jester enemy's attack speed from 1.4s -> 2.1s
- Added a dedicated OST for a traversal room

archive.title: Update
archive.summary:
- Reduced the sky elevator repair cost from 20 -> 10 for the demo
- Removed the recoil/ knockback the boomboxer gives during attacks
- Increased boomboxer’s attack hit speed from 1.5s to 1.8s
- Locked the Deep Sea biome for the demo, opened the into space biome (partly, it’s more atmospheric)
